name: NewLimit announced formation to extend human healthspan
summary: NewLimit announced its formation as a company focused on extending human healthspan by targeting epigenetic drivers of aging.
significance_note: Adds a visible epigenetic reprogramming and healthspan company to the field map. It does not establish efficacy or clinical benefit.

surface_routing.rationale: The launch is material company infrastructure for epigenetic reprogramming but should not be treated as evidence.
